tagline: The ultimate anthem of loyalty and unity.
liner: From the gritty barrio streets to a global stage, this track pulses with an infectious energy that demands you move. It is more than music; it is a declaration of family bloodlines rising against adversity. The confident lead voice weaves Spanglish verses over deep 808s and sharp claps, creating a sound both polished and raw. As the siren risers cut through the night, the crew chants in unison, transforming individual struggle into collective power. This isn't just about posing; it is about authentic identity celebrated under dark brass hits. Whether you are dancing at 98 BPM or feeling the spiritual brotherhood of the bridge, every note reinforces a message simple yet profound: together, we shine brighter than ever before.
worldCaption: A bouncy 98 BPM journey through barrio block parties and global unity, where deep bass meets sharp claps under aggressive brass hits.

bios.lead: Delivers confident Spanglish verses with swaggering pride.
bios.back: Layers harmonies to swell the chorus into a massive roar.
bios.drums: Keeps the floor shaking at ninety-eight beats per minute.
bios.perc: Adds tropical rhythms that make every footstep dance-ready.
bios.bass: Pumps deep 808 frequencies through the chest like thunder.
bios.synth: Paints dark brass hits with siren-like rising melodies.
bios.other: Sprinkles minimal piano stabs to ground the sonic floor.
